title: 开源LLM收入或超Anthropic，Cursor已实现
full_text:
I actually see it differently.
More and more companies are moving from renting closed-source LLMs to “owning model weights” with open-source LLMs and post-training.
Cursor did it.
OSS LLMs’ revenue could surpass Anthropic at some point. https://t.co/hHDElC7w19
